category_sources: Official Tailor site and GitHub wiki describe Tailor as a cross-platform static analyzer and linter for Swift.
display_name_sources: Official site heading and GitHub wiki use "Tailor".
docs_sources: Official site links Documentation and Rules to the project GitHub wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sleekbyte/tailor; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official site/wiki describe Swift static analysis, linting, command-line usage, rules, and style enforcement.
